nasb.text: Open to me the gates of righteousness; I shall enter through them, I shall give thanks to the Lord.

esv.text: Open to me the gates of righteousness, that I may enter through them and give thanks to the Lord.

cnv.text: 請你們為我打開正義的門， 我要進去，稱謝耶和華。

ccb.text: 给我打开圣殿的门吧， 我要进去称谢耶和华。

csbs.text: 为我打开公义之门吧， 我要进去称谢耶和华！
